languages.text: Потускневшие шевроны на рукаве шинели идентифицируют гвардейца как бойца 138-го полка механизированной пехоты Корпуса Смерти Крига.
Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.
languages.original_text: Потускневшие шевроны на рукаве шинели идентифицируют гвардейца как бойца 138-го полка механизированной пехоты Корпуса Смерти Крига.

traits.locale_text: Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.
Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.
Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.

languages.text: 他外套袖口上褪色的V形标志表明，这名卫兵隶属于克里格死亡军团第138机械化步兵团。
languages.original_text: Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.

traits.locale_text: 他外套袖口上褪色的V形标志表明，这名卫兵隶属于克里格死亡军团第138机械化步兵团。

languages.text: Los galones desgastados de su gabardina identifican al guardia como miembro del 138.º regimiento de infantería mecanizada de los Korps de la muerte de Krieg.
languages.original_text: Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.

traits.locale_text: Los galones desgastados de su gabardina identifican al guardia como miembro del 138.º regimiento de infantería mecanizada de los Korps de la muerte de Krieg.

languages.text: À en croire les chevrons ternis sur la manche de son manteau, cet homme appartenait au 138e régiment d'infanterie motorisée de la Death Korps de Krieg.
languages.original_text: Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.

traits.locale_text: À en croire les chevrons ternis sur la manche de son manteau, cet homme appartenait au 138e régiment d'infanterie motorisée de la Death Korps de Krieg.

languages.text: Paltosunun kolundaki solmuş şeritler, Muhafız'ı Krieg Ölüm Kolordusu'nun 138. Mekanize Piyade Alayı'nın bir mensubu olarak tanımlıyor.
languages.original_text: Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.

traits.locale_text: Paltosunun kolundaki solmuş şeritler, Muhafız'ı Krieg Ölüm Kolordusu'nun 138. Mekanize Piyade Alayı'nın bir mensubu olarak tanımlıyor.

languages.text: Verblasste Rangabzeichen am Ärmel seines Mantels identifizieren den Gardisten als Mitglied des 138. mechanisierten Infanterieregiments des Todeskorps von Krieg.
languages.original_text: Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.

traits.locale_text: Verblasste Rangabzeichen am Ärmel seines Mantels identifizieren den Gardisten als Mitglied des 138. mechanisierten Infanterieregiments des Todeskorps von Krieg.

languages.text: 彼のオーバーコートの袖に、色あせたチェロが描かれている。これは、死の軍団・クリーグの第138機甲歩兵連隊に所属していることを示している。
languages.original_text: Faded chevrons on the sleeve of his overcoat identify the Guardsman as a member of the 138th Mechanised Infantry Regiment of the Death Korps of Krieg.

traits.locale_text: 彼のオーバーコートの袖に、色あせたチェロが描かれている。これは、死の軍団・クリーグの第138機甲歩兵連隊に所属していることを示している。
